title: Tempting Tropical Fruit Bowl
description: A refreshing and healthy dessert or snack made with a mix of exotic fruits, perfect for warm weather.
instructions: Wash the fruits thoroughly and pat them dry.
Cut the fruit mix into bite-sized chunks.
In a large bowl, mix together the coconut milk and honey (if using).
Add the chopped pistachios to the bowl.
Arrange the fruit chunks on top of the coconut milk mixture.
Garnish with additional chopped pistachios and a sprinkle of honey (if using).
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
